$comment: M2 — the §D2 coverage table: every eval id maps to an executable owner. Kinds: rig-test (reshape-rig.test.mjs), component-test (an existing *.test.mjs), script (executable, run at its phase with recorded output), ci (the CI pipeline itself), procedure (a P4 step whose evidence is committed — used only where a live external surface (GitHub API, deployed dashboard) can't run inside node:test). The M2 rig test asserts every id below has an owner and every canonical §D2 id is present.

F1.owner: F1: `os:` command → hook BLOCKS with real doctor result

F2.owner: F2: natural language → additionalContext with 🔁 trace + OPERATING PROTOCOL

F4.owner: F4: orchestrator --demo routes to doctor and completes

C1.owner: C1: confinement blocks a sibling-project read (exit 2)

C2.owner: C2: confinement allows an in-repo read (exit 0)

C3.owner: C3: doctor ×5 — deterministic, all exit 0, each within budget

C4.owner: harness/sandbox/handoff/handoff.test.mjs — location-guarantee tests (writes land in record/handoffs/ + docs/RESUME-HERE.md inside the repo)

C5.owner: harness/sandbox/reconciler/reconciler.test.mjs — injected limbo → exactly one incident, idempotent

C6.owner: [P2-target] C6 [fault-injected]: doctor.mjs missing → the doctor handler fails LOUD, never a fabricated clean bill

G1.owner: G1: all four checks exit 0 on the live tree

G2.owner: G2 [fault-injected]: deleting a declared candidate dir → doctor exits 1 (declared-but-absent)

G3.owner: G3 [fault-injected]: corrupt governance-ledger line → governance-check exits 1

G4.owner: [P1-target] G4 [fault-injected]: rogue top-level dir → structure-check fails EXPLICITLY (fail-closed)

G5.owner: G5a (ghost target → exit 1) + [P1-target] G5b (unimportable targets → loud fail)

G6.owner: G6 [fault-injected]: substantive change without a version bump → doctor exits 1

G7.owner: G7: every CODEOWNERS path pattern matches a real repo path

G8.owner: G8: ci.yml at root + find-glob intact + discovered test files ≥ baseline

G9.owner: .github/workflows/ci.yml required check — all tests green; count floor enforced by G8 + battery-baseline.json

O2.owner: O2: live record runs stream is complete (gaps=0, dups=0) — absent-tolerant on fresh checkouts

O3.owner: F3 (the statusline IS the O3 surface)

O4.owner: o4-dashboard-check.mjs — availability-only dashboard fetch + sync graceful-skip; run before/after at P4 with recorded output (NN2)

S1.owner: [P2-target] S1: isolation boot — snapshot boots with harness/ AND governance/ renamed away

S2.owner: [P2-target] S2: missing file inside the snapshot → boot fails LOUD

S3.owner: [P2-target] S3: blank/wrong snapshot version → boot refuses (explicit refusal, not unknown-flag)

S4.owner: [P2-target] S4: partial snapshot → cut-then-verify REFUSES (explicit verify refusal)

S5.owner: [P2-target] S5: stale current pointer → boot-check refuses loudly

S6.owner: [P3-target] S6: channel mismatch (channel=next with no next release) → loud refusal

S7.owner: [P2-target] S7: version stamp survives under snapshot boot

S8.owner: [P2-target] S8: record/ + state/ live OUTSIDE the snapshot; snapshot boot writes to the external data layer

X1.owner: [P3-target] X1: harness-lock wired live + a colliding write is functionally BLOCKED (exit 2)

X2.owner: X2a (green-required: existing O_EXCL lock holds at fan-out load) + [P3-target] X2b (a LIVE holder's lock is never stolen; forced breaks must be recorded loudly)

X3.owner: [P3-target] X3: two concurrent publishes → current pointer intact (boot-check green) — no disjunctive escape

R1.owner: rollback-drill.mjs <adoption-sha> — executed at P4, output recorded in the evidence pack

W1.owner: [P4-target] W1: an out-of-repo write is BLOCKED under lockdown (fail-closed allowlist)

W2.owner: W2: harness-lock blocks a foreign-lock write (control exists today, dormant; X1 proves the live wiring)

W3.owner: P4: re-run the FULL battery with controls flipped fail-closed; the battery output under lockdown is the evidence (committed to the evidence pack)

W4.owner: [P4-target] W4: adopted state — settings.json boots from .system/releases/current (sealed), not the workbench

W5.owner: P4: gh api branch-protection + required-check assertion + a direct-to-main push attempt, output recorded in the evidence pack (external GitHub surface — not runnable inside CI's node:test)

M1.owner: adversarial multi-agent peer review at each phase gate; P0 run: 25 confirmed findings folded in (workflow wf_bfd59fcc-292, evidence pack)

M2.owner: M2: this coverage table is complete — every canonical §D2 id has an owner

NN1.owner: F1+F2+F3 every commit; post-adoption live-fire: the next real prompt must show the 🔁 trace (procedure step in P4 evidence)

NN2.owner: o4-dashboard-check.mjs before/after (availability-only) + web/ untouched enforced by grep-gate scope + golden master
